import sys,io
sys.stdout=io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer,encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')
sys.stderr=io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer,encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser=p.chromium.connect_over_cdp('http://localhost:9222')
    ctx=browser.contexts[0]
    print(f'Pages: {len(ctx.pages)}')
    for i,pg in enumerate(ctx.pages):
        u=pg.url
        print(f'[{i}] {u[:100]}')
    # Find maps or sign-in page
    for pg in ctx.pages:
        if 'maps' in pg.url and 'contrib' in pg.url:
            print(f'\nMAPS PAGE: {pg.url}')
            t=pg.title()
            print(f'Title: {t}')
            # Check for form inputs
            inputs=pg.query_selector_all('input[type=text], input:not([type])')
            print(f'Text inputs: {len(inputs)}')
            for j,inp in enumerate(inputs[:10]):
                ar=inp.get_attribute('aria-label') or ''
                n=inp.get_attribute('name') or ''
                print(f'  input[{j}] name={n} aria={ar}')
            break
    browser.close()
description: Playwright SYNC CDP - فحص صفحة Maps
